# Marshall & Co. Bespoke Home Improvements

> Premier bespoke joinery and structural renovation company based in Perth, Scotland. Personally led by Lee Marshall with over 20 years of hands-on industry experience.

## About

Marshall & Co. Bespoke Home Improvements is a specialist construction and joinery firm serving Perth, Perthshire, and the surrounding region. Every project is personally overseen by owner Lee Marshall from initial consultation through to final handover. The company works across traditional sandstone properties and modern new builds, delivering high-end structural renovations, custom carpentry, and full home transformations.

## Services

- **Home Renovations** - Full interior and structural remodels tailored to the existing property
- **House Extensions** - Single and double-storey extensions including groundworks, structure, and interior fit-out
- **Garage Conversions** - Full conversion to habitable space, including insulation, electrics, and finishing
- **Loft Conversions** - Structurally engineered roof space conversions creating bedrooms, offices, or suites
- **Kitchen Renovations** - Bespoke kitchen design and installation, including joinery, worktops, and fitting
- **Bathroom Renovations** - Full bathroom strip-out and refit to a high specification
- **Media Walls & Panelling** - Custom-built media walls and decorative wall panelling
- **Windows & Doors** - Supply and installation of replacement windows and doors
- **Garden Rooms** - Insulated, fully finished garden rooms for year-round use
- **Decking** - Bespoke timber and composite decking design and installation
- **Insurance Repair Work** - Structural and finishing repairs for insurance claims

## Why Choose Marshall & Co.

- Over 20 years of hands-on field experience
- Every project personally led by Lee Marshall - no subcontracting the management
- 5-star rated across all reviews
- Works across the full spectrum: traditional sandstone homes to modern new builds
- Specialist in bespoke joinery alongside structural work - a rare combination

## Service Area

Perth, Dundee, Perthshire, Auchterarder, Kinross, Crieff, Blairgowrie, Dunblane, Coupar Angus, Scone, Bridge of Earn, Alyth, Stanley, Luncarty, Almondbank, Milnathort, Abernethy, Bankfoot, Errol, Methven, Comrie, Inchture, Dunkeld
